title: Responsive layout fix + complete professional admin panel

requirements.text: Fix responsive layout across the entire public-facing site (ReevesPublicSite and all its section components): all text sizes, image dimensions, spacing, and grid layouts must adapt correctly for both mobile (≤768px) and laptop (≥1024px) viewports. Ensure hero headline, hero image/agent portrait, stat row, service cards, testimonial carousel, quote form fields, and footer columns are all properly stacked and readable on mobile without horizontal overflow or clipped content.

quotes: adjust them properly for both mobile and laptop all text and image should be adjusted properly for both device

acceptanceCriteria: No horizontal scroll on any public page at 375px viewport width
Hero image and headline are fully visible and readable on mobile
Quote form fields stack vertically and are full-width on mobile
Testimonial carousel, service cards, and footer all display correctly at both 375px and 1280px widths
All font sizes use responsive Tailwind classes (text-sm → text-xl scaling)

requirements.text: Add an 'Agent Login' button in the top-right corner of the ReevesHeader component. Clicking it opens a modal dialog with a username/password form. Credentials admin / conroe123 grant access to the admin dashboard. On successful login, close the modal and navigate to the admin dashboard route. Show an error message for invalid credentials. This login must be purely frontend credential-check (no Internet Identity required for this admin flow).

quotes: Username: admin | Password: conroe123 → Dark dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: 'Agent Login' button visible in header top-right on all screen sizes
Clicking button opens a centered modal overlay with username and password fields
Entering admin / conroe123 and submitting navigates to /admin/dashboard
Incorrect credentials display 'Invalid credentials' error inside the modal
Modal can be dismissed by clicking outside or an X button

requirements.text: Build a complete admin dashboard page at /admin/dashboard with a dark theme using background colors #1a1a2e and #16213e and accent green #0f3460. The dashboard must display: (1) Four stat cards — Total Leads: 127 (+15%), Quotes: 23 (18% conv rate), Calls: 45, Won: 8 ($24K revenue); (2) A leads table with columns Name, Phone, Email, Policy, Status, Date — pre-populated with at least 8 sample rows using real Conroe TX first/last names and 936-area-code phone numbers; (3) Status filter tabs: New / Called / Won with live table filtering; (4) An Export CSV button that downloads the visible leads as a CSV file; (5) A leads-per-week line chart (7 days); (6) A policy type pie chart showing Auto 45%, Home 30%, Life 15%, Commercial 10%.

quotes: [4 Cards]: Total Leads: 127 (+15%) | Quotes: 23 (18% conv) | Calls: 45 | Won: 8 ($24K)
[Leads Table]: Name | Phone | Email | Policy | Status | Date
[Charts]: Leads/week line + Policy pie (Auto45% Home30% Life15% Comm10%)

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page renders at /admin/dashboard with #1a1a2e/#16213e dark background
All 4 stat cards visible with correct values and trend indicators
Leads table shows at least 8 rows with Conroe TX names and 936-xxx-xxxx phone numbers
Filtering by New/Called/Won correctly shows only matching rows
Export CSV button downloads a CSV file containing the filtered leads data
Line chart renders leads per day for the past 7 days
Pie chart renders with correct percentage segments and legend labels

requirements.text: Build the admin panel side navigation and layout shell with these sections: Dashboard (default), Leads, Policy Management, Lead Assignment, Analytics, and PDF Invoices. The layout must use the dark theme (#1a1a2e sidebar, #16213e main area, #0f3460 accent). Implement stub pages for Policy Management (list view placeholder), Lead Assignment (assign lead to agent dropdown placeholder), Analytics (extended charts placeholder), and PDF Invoices (invoice list with a 'Generate PDF' button per row that triggers a browser print/PDF of a simple invoice template).

quotes: AGENT FEATURES: Policy management | Lead assignment | Analytics | PDF invoices

acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar navigation includes all 6 sections with active-state highlight using #0f3460
Policy Management page renders with a placeholder list
Lead Assignment page renders with a lead list and an agent assignment dropdown per row
Analytics page renders extended chart placeholders
PDF Invoices page lists invoices and each row has a 'Generate PDF' button that opens a printable invoice in a new tab or triggers window.print()

requirements.text: Make the admin panel fully responsive for mobile: replace the sidebar navigation with a hamburger menu that opens a slide-out drawer on screens ≤768px; stack the 4 stat cards vertically on mobile; make the leads table horizontally scrollable (swipeable) on small screens.

quotes: MOBILE: Hamburger menu | Stacked cards | Swipe table

acceptanceCriteria: At 375px viewport, sidebar is hidden and a hamburger icon appears in the admin header
Tapping hamburger opens a full-height slide-out drawer with all nav links
Stat cards stack in a single column on mobile
Leads table is horizontally scrollable without clipping on mobile
All admin text and buttons remain readable and tappable on mobile

requirements.text: Protect the admin routes so that unauthenticated users (not logged in via the admin/conroe123 credential check) are redirected to the home page or a login prompt when navigating directly to /admin/*. Store the admin session state in sessionStorage so it persists across page refreshes during the session but clears on tab close.

quotes: Username: admin | Password: conroe123 → Dark dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating directly to /admin/dashboard without being logged in redirects to the public home page
After successful login, refreshing the admin dashboard keeps the user logged in
Closing the browser tab and reopening clears the admin session
A logout button in the admin header clears session and redirects to home

constraints: KEEP ALL PUBLIC FRONTEND IDENTICAL — hero section, quote form, testimonials, and footer must not change in content or structure
Admin dark theme must strictly use #1a1a2e, #16213e, and #0f3460 as specified
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Admin login must use credential check (admin / conroe123) — do not require Internet Identity for this flow
Sample leads must use real Conroe TX names and 936-area-code phone numbers
nonGoals: Changing any content, copy, or visual design of the public-facing landing page sections
Integrating a real backend database for admin leads data (static/mock data is acceptable)
Real PDF generation library — browser print dialog is sufficient for PDF invoices
Internet Identity authentication for the admin login modal
Real-time data updates or WebSocket integration
